steps.title: Welcome to Surgewave Docs
steps.text: This is the official documentation for Kuestenlogik.Surgewave, a high-performance Kafka replacement built with .NET 10. Let's take a quick tour!

steps.title: Navigation
steps.text: Use the sidebar to navigate between sections: Features, Clients, AI Integration, Storage, and more.

steps.title: Search
steps.text: Use the search bar to quickly find topics across all documentation.

steps.title: Get Started
steps.text: Head to the Quickstart guide to set up your first Surgewave broker, or explore the Client documentation to start coding.
